verse_text: and most of the brethren in the Lord, having become confident by my chains, are much more bold to speak the word without fear.

links.context: Elihu has uttered great and powerful words, yet immediately follows up with pride and foolishness. He is like those who "preach Christ even from envy and strife... not sincerely, supposing to add affliction" to the suffering of another ([[PHP.1:14]]-17).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
